hypothesis_en: Ladies and gentlemen, I ask you to take your seats. We have allowed six minutes of courtesy to pass over the time we had set. Ladies and gentlemen, we resume the session. Yesterday's minutes of yesterday's session have been distributed. Is there any observation on the part of any member? I understand that there are those who are not sitting, do not have their helmets on and may not be able to understand I will do what I say, but I will say it for the last time. Is there any observation in yesterday's report that has been distributed? No, in that case it is approved.
reference_en: (1.94) ladies and gentlemen (1.05) please be seated (1.86) we've given you an extra six minutes beyond the time we fixed ((President starts speaking in Spanish)) señoras y señores dip= ((President stops speaking)) ladies and gentlemen let us resume the sitting now the minutes of yesterday's sitting have been circulated I repeat the minutes of yesterday's sitting have been circulated are there any comments (1.28) fr= from Members please any comments from Members on the minutes of yesterday's sitting (1.43) you're not a= you're not all seated you don't all have your headphones on and it may well be that y= you can't hear what I'm saying but let me say for the last time (1.53) are there any comments please on the minutes of yesterday's sitting which have been circulated no in that case the minutes are adopted
source_es: señoras y señores diputados les ruego que tomen asiento hemos dejado pasar seis minutos de cortesía sobre el horario que nos habíamos fijado señoras y señores diputados reanudamos la sesión el acta de la sesión de ayer ha sido distribuida repito el acta de la sesión de ayer ha sido distribuida hay alguna observación por parte de algún miembro comprendo que hay a quien no esté sentado no tiene los cascos puestos (1.05) y no puede quizá entender lo que digo pero lo diré por última vez hay alguna observación al acta de ayer que ha sido distribuida no en ese caso queda aprobada
